title: Update Water Log
description: Updates the quantity consumed for a user's water log entry with the given Water Log ID.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: water-log-id
parameters.description: The ID of the water log to be updated.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of water consumed in the format X.X and in the specified unit or in the unit system that corresponds to the Accept-Language header provided.

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Water measurement unit. Supported : ml | fl oz | cup
